description: Search for or read a FHIR Observation resource covering labs, vitals, device measurements, and other structured clinical values. For direct read, provide _id alone. For search, patient is always required plus at least one of category or code. If the user gives a plain-language measurement or device concept and the correct code is uncertain, resolve it with code_search before using category or code filters. Category-only searches are broad fallbacks after code resolution. Common categories: laboratory, vital-signs, core-characteristics. For high-frequency or multi-day data, use compact mode with a high maxResults. Use category=core-characteristics with code 76516-4 (gestational age) or 8339-4 (birth weight) for core characteristic lookups.

searchParams._id: Observation resource ID — performs direct read when provided alone
searchParams.based-on: Reference to the request (order) that triggered the observation
searchParams.combo-code: Code for the observation or any of its components (LOINC, SNOMED)
searchParams.combo-data-absent-reason: Why the value is missing on the observation or any of its components
searchParams.combo-value-concept: Coded value of the observation or any of its components
searchParams.component-data-absent-reason: Why the value is missing on an observation component
searchParams.component-value-concept: Coded value of an observation component
searchParams.data-absent-reason: Why the observation value is missing
searchParams.derived-from: Related resource this observation is derived from
searchParams.encounter: Encounter during which the observation was made
searchParams.focus: What the observation is about, when not the patient
searchParams.has-member: Related component or member observation (e.g. panel members)
searchParams.issued: Date/time the observation was made available
searchParams.method: Method used to produce the observation
searchParams.part-of: Larger event this observation is part of
searchParams.patient: Patient resource ID or reference — required for search
searchParams.subject: Subject of the observation (Patient) — equivalent to patient, not usable at the same time
searchParams.value-concept: Coded value of the observation (when the result is a code)
searchParams.value-date: Date/time value of the observation (when the result is a date)
searchParams.value-string: String value of the observation (when the result is text)
